name: Jasmine Hamouda
title: IT Student · Data Analytics & IoT · HR & Systems Professional
about: HR-to-IT professional with 2 years of experience in systems administration, process improvement, and data management across disability services, real estate, and HR technology. Currently completing a Bachelor of IT (Data Analytics & IoT) at Griffith University, with 1.5 years of hands-on IT study covering SQL, Python, database design, and business analysis. Highly AI-literate with strong prompt engineering skills, utilising AI tools to work efficiently and amplify existing capabilities across technical and professional tasks.
